  FreeBSD ports repository

  - Move to LOCALBASE [1]
  - Makefile cleanups [1]
  - Add support for NOPORTDOCS
  - Bump PORTREVISION [1]
  
  PR:             ports/106730
  Submitted by:   jylefort [1]
  Approved by:    erwin (mentor)
